{{Infobox technique
| name = Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a specialized cycling technique used to expand a practitioner's capacity for storing [[madra]]. By visualizing a stone wheel that grinds against the boundaries of the core, the user employs temporary power to push and stretch these internal limits, allowing for a permanent increase in [[madra]] reserves. This method is more efficient than attempting to expand the core by swallowing forged scales, as it keeps the entire energy cycle contained without loss. Despite its effectiveness for growth, the technique is notoriously difficult and painful to practice. It is described as a slow, agonizing process that can make the user feel as though they are suffocating or dying, often causing physical sensations similar to having metal bands tightened around the lungs or a burning sensation in the spirit and chest. While it is an excellent tool for increasing core depth, it is considered a poor method for the rapid replenishment of [[madra]] compared to other cycling techniques.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a training technique used by [[Eithan]], who taught it to [[Lindon]]. This method functions like a drill that creates profound depths in a core by grinding at its borders to improve the capacity to contain [[madra]]. By forming a spiral within the core, the technique condenses [[madra]] quality, increases receptivity to spiritual forces, improves control, and speeds up recovery. [[Lindon]] utilized the technique for months to replenish his [[madra]] through heavy, long breathing cycles.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] helps reach [[Jade]] by forming a spiral in the core, condensing [[madra]] quality, increasing receptivity to spiritual forces, speeding up [[madra]] recovery, and improving control.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] focuses on improving capacity to contain [[madra]] by grinding at the core's borders.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] works with any [[madra]], including pure.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is used for training.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is a technique used by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] taught [[Lindon]] the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]] to replenish his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] makes [[Lindon]]'s breathing heavy and long.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is compared to a drill that creates profound depths in cores.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has cycled the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] for months.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] cycled according to the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is a technique that feels like breathing through a thin straw to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] has practiced the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] for years.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is a technique [[Lindon]] has recorded experience with.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|For months, he'd been stretching his core using the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is a cycling technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] used the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] to push for a deeper core.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] used the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] to advance.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has practiced the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] for a year and a half.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has confidence in the depth of his cores due to the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] focuses on expanding the core.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] allows [[Lindon]] to fight another battle immediately.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] is a technique [[Lindon]] has tried to force.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel!” Eithan shouted.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
